name: Atlanta Title Loans
description_short: Atlanta Title Loans provides fast cash loans using vehicle titles as collateral, with loans up to $10,000 and same-day funding at multiple Georgia locations.
description_long:
Atlanta Title Loans was founded in 1990 in Jonesboro, Georgia, and has operated for over 25 years as a title loan provider across multiple states. The company positions itself as helping working Americans access emergency cash by leveraging the equity in their vehicles. They operate at least five locations in the greater Atlanta area (Marietta, Mableton, Norcross, Decatur, and College Park) with additional locations nationwide.

The company offers auto title loans with loan amounts up to $10,000, subject to vehicle evaluation and ability to repay. To qualify, customers need only their vehicle, a photo ID, and a clear vehicle title. Atlanta Title Loans accepts multiple payment methods including cash, check, debit card, and Western Union. They maintain extended hours, with most locations open Monday-Friday 10 AM-6 PM and Saturday mornings, making access convenient for working borrowers.

Atlanta Title Loans distinguishes itself through its 25-year operational history and multi-state presence, suggesting established infrastructure and familiarity with varying state regulations. The company maintains compliance disclosures for regulated states including Virginia (operating as LoanMax under Fairfax Elite Financial Services), Delaware, New Mexico, Nevada, and Michigan, indicating they operate within legal frameworks specific to each jurisdiction.

As a title loan lender, Atlanta Title Loans serves borrowers who need immediate cash but may lack traditional credit access. However, title loans carry significant risks: they are short-term products with high effective interest rates, require vehicle collateral (risking repossession if payments are missed), and are typically not recommended as long-term financial solutions. The Nevada disclosure explicitly warns that customers with credit difficulties should seek credit counseling before pursuing a title loan.
address: 1276 Veterans Memorial Hwy SW, Mableton, GA 30126

company_info.headquarters: 1276 Veterans Memorial Hwy SW, Mableton, GA 30126

pros: Loans up to $10,000 available with fast approval process
Multiple convenient Georgia locations (5+ in greater Atlanta area)
Minimal documentation required: vehicle, photo ID, and clear title only
Extended business hours including Saturday mornings at most locations
Multiple payment methods accepted: cash, check, debit card, Western Union
Online account access and payment options available
cons: Title loans are high-cost short-term debt products with implicit APRs typically exceeding 100-300%
Vehicle collateral is at risk of repossession if loan payments are missed
No specific APR, finance charge, or fee information disclosed on website
Company explicitly warns (Nevada) that title loans should not be used as long-term financial solutions
Limited loan approval transparency; amounts are 'subject to vehicle evaluation' with no published criteria
best_for: Borrowers with immediate emergency cash needs who own vehicles with clear titles
People with poor credit who cannot qualify for traditional personal loans or credit cards
Short-term bridge borrowers with plans to repay quickly (within weeks to months)
diagnosis: Atlanta Title Loans is appropriate for borrowers experiencing genuine financial emergencies who own vehicles and need fast cash without credit checks, but only as a true short-term solution. The critical caveat is that title loans are expensive emergency products carrying risks of vehicle repossession and should not be used for ongoing financial needs—consumers should explore payday alternatives, credit counseling, or personal loans first if possible.
services: In-person loan applications at physical locations
Payment by cash, check, debit card, or Western Union
